description.en: Build a secure random password generator with custom length, special characters, and strength scoring.
description.ta: தனிப்பயன் நீளம், சிறப்பு எழுத்துக்கள் மற்றும் வலிமை மதிப்பீடு கொண்ட பாதுகாப்பான சீரற்ற கடவுச்சொல் ஜெனரேட்டரை உருவாக்குங்கள்.

story_variants.en:
## Forge Unbreakable Passwords!

"password123" — the most hacked password in the world. Let's fix that by building a tool that generates cryptographically strong passwords in Python.

### What You'll Learn
- `random` and `secrets` modules
- String manipulation with `string` module
- Function parameters with defaults
- f-string formatting

### Why This Matters
- 81% of breaches are caused by weak passwords
- A 16-character random password takes ~1 trillion years to crack
- Your tool will be more useful than most apps on the App Store!

> **Fun fact:** The `secrets` module uses your OS's cryptographic random number generator — making it truly unpredictable.

explanation.en: Import string — provides character sets (letters, digits, punctuation)
Define a function with configurable length and special char toggle
Start with uppercase + lowercase letters + digits (62 characters)
Optionally add special characters for extra strength
Add common special characters (76 total chars now)
Pick random characters, one at a time, and join them into a string
Generate a 16-char password with special characters
Generate an 8-char password without special characters

instruction.en: Write a function called `generate_pin(length)` that generates a random numeric PIN of the given length using the `random` module. Then call it with length 4 and print the result.

hints.en: Import random, then use random.randint(0, 9) inside a loop

quiz.q: Why use `secrets` instead of `random` for passwords?
